results.title: Average of Map Values
results.description: Write a program to find the average of all values in a Map. The map contains: A=10, B=19, C=23. Print the average rounded to 2 decimal places.
results.code:
# Write your solution here
# Input Map
data_map = {'A': 10, 'B': 19, 'C': 23}

# Calculate Average
if len(data_map) > 0:
    # Sum all values in the map
    total_sum = sum(data_map.values())
    # Count the number of items
    count = len(data_map)
    # Calculate and format the average
    average = total_sum / count
    print(f"{average:.2f}")
else:
    print("0.00")
# Output: 17.33
